reviews.comment:
1.15 hs para cargar, llegas al surtidor y te dicen que no funciona el de infijia te mandan para el otro. Sólo 2 playeros para la cantidad de gente, colas y colas de autos. De cuarta el servicio.

(Translated by Google)
It takes 1 hour and 15 minutes to fill up. You get to the pump and they tell you the one for Infijia isn't working, so they send you to the other one. There are only two attendants for the number of people, and there are lines and lines of cars. The service is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYbU56M2RBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cordial atención, limpieza y personal muy amable. Lo que le juega en contra es la ubicación de los surtidores. Por el resto, como dije, un Excelente punto para hacer una parada..

(Translated by Google)
Friendly service, cleanliness, and very kind staff. The only downside is the location of the pumps. Otherwise, as I said, an excellent place to stop.

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio de bandera. El combustible es el mismo que en todos lados. La atención es mínima, solo dos playeros para toda la estación una atención por la falta de personal, si es responsabilidad del ACA ver qué el servicio sea el adecuado. Entre 45 y 50 minutos de espera.

(Translated by Google)
Flagship service station. Fuel is the same as everywhere else. Service is minimal, with only two attendants for the entire station due to staff shortages. It's the ACA's responsibility to ensure adequate service. Wait times range from 45 to 50 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuaGVMOTVBRRAB
